title: Ordering at a Chinese Restaurant 中餐厅点餐

lines.en: Look at this menu! So many dishes.
Yes. I want to try the sweet and sour pork.
lines.zh: 是的。我想试试糖醋里脊。

lines.en: Good choice! I will have the kung pao chicken.
Yes, two bowls of rice, please.
How about some vegetables? The mapo tofu looks nice.
lines.zh: 来点蔬菜怎么样？麻婆豆腐看起来不错。

lines.en: Sure. And maybe a hot and sour soup.
lines.zh: 当然。也许再来个酸辣汤。

lines.en: That is a great idea. I love hot and sour soup.
Excuse me, we are ready to order.
lines.zh: 你好，我们准备好点餐了。

lines.en: We would like three dishes, two bowls of rice, and one soup.
lines.zh: 我们想要三个菜，两碗米饭和一份汤。
